name: model rationale detector returns an exit code of 1 when at least one prompt fails the check
command:
mkdir -p prompts/a prompts/b && printf 'name: a
model: sonnet
model_rationale: ok
' > prompts/a/v1.0.0.md && printf 'name: b
model: opus
' > prompts/b/v1.0.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/model-rationale.sh" --prompts-dir prompts 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'prompts_failed=1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
